    1. CategoryRange(String, int, int)

Klasse ArticleGUI.CategoryRange

java.lang.Object
ch.framedev.lagersystem.guis.ArticleGUI.CategoryRange
Umschließende Klasse:
ArticleGUI
public static class ArticleGUI.CategoryRange extends Object
Helper class to represent a category and its associated article number range. Loaded from categories.json.

  • Feldübersicht

    Felder
    Modifikator und Typ
    Feld
    Beschreibung
    String
    category
    The name of the category (e.g., "Getränke")
    int
    rangeEnd
    The ending article number for this category (inclusive)
    int
    rangeStart
    The starting article number for this category (inclusive)

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    CategoryRange(String category, int start, int end)
    Creates a new CategoryRange with the specified category name and article number range.

  • Methodenübersicht

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Felddetails

    • category

      public String category
      The name of the category (e.g., "Getränke")

    • rangeStart

      public int rangeStart
      The starting article number for this category (inclusive)

    • rangeEnd

      public int rangeEnd
      The ending article number for this category (inclusive)

  • Konstruktordetails

    • CategoryRange

      public CategoryRange(String category, int start, int end)
      Creates a new CategoryRange with the specified category name and article number range.
      Parameter:
      category - The name of the category (e.g., "Getränke")
      start - The starting article number for this category (inclusive)
      end - The ending article number for this category (inclusive)
